null,\000d\000a name varchar(255) not null,\000d\000a picture varchar(255),\000d\000a role enum ('GUEST','USER') not null,\000d\000a primary key (id)\000d\000a ) engine=InnoDB"; expected "identifier"; SQL statement:
create table user ( created_date datetime(6), id bigint not null auto_increment, modified_date datetime(6), email varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255) not null, picture varchar(255), role enum
